name: BonVoyage Flight Expert Agent
description: AI-powered Flight Pricing Expert that estimates realistic economy round-trip flight costs between an origin and destination city, providing low-high price ranges in the traveler's preferred currency.

skills.name: Flight Cost Estimation
skills.description: Estimates realistic economy round-trip flight costs between an origin and destination city. Returns a tight low-high price range based on route distance, demand, and seasonal factors.
examples: Estimate flight cost from New York to Lisbon in USD.
How much would a round-trip economy flight from London to Bangkok cost in GBP?
